inputs.titre: Trajan lance la construction de son forum à Rome

reason: The image depicts a Roman construction scene, consistent with the construction of Trajan's Forum.  The clothing (togas and tunics), architecture (columns, marble), and building materials (stone blocks) are all appropriate for the era. There is no visible modern technology or anachronistic architecture. The use of scaffolding is reasonable for the time period. The lighting and dust contribute to the atmosphere.
